title: Australia Adventure
description: Explore the top sights of Sydney, the Gold Coast, and Melbourne on this 9-day Australian tour. Experience the Sydney Opera House, take a cable car ride in the Blue Mountains, visit theme parks on the Gold Coast, and drive along the Great Ocean Road.
highlights: Scenic Harbour Cruise and city sights in Sydney
Cable car rides in the Blue Mountains and wildlife encounters
Pass to Warner Bros. Movie World on the Gold Coast
Drive along the Great Ocean Road to see the Twelve Apostles

title: Bali Bliss
description: Experience the culture and beaches of Bali on this 7-day tropical tour. Visit Ubud's rice terraces, view Mount Batur volcano, watch the Uluwatu Kecak dance, and enjoy a seafood dinner on Jimbaran Beach.
highlights: Explore the Sacred Monkey Forest and rice terraces in Ubud
Visit the cliffside sea temples of Tanah Lot and Uluwatu
Enjoy water sports at Tanjung Benoa and an optional Nusa Penida trip
Sunset seafood BBQ dinner on the sands of Jimbaran Beach

title: Darjeeling Delight
description: Experience the scenic beauty of the Queen of the Hills on this 5-day Darjeeling tour package. Cover spectacular Himalayan views, historic tea estates, the iconic Toy Train joyride, and cultural landmarks.
highlights: Scenic drive to Darjeeling and relaxation at Mall Road
Tiger Hill sunrise view over Mount Kanchenjunga
Ride the UNESCO-listed Darjeeling Toy Train to Ghoom
Day trip excursion to the picturesque Sumendu Lake in Mirik

title: Dubai Delight
description: Experience the modern architecture and desert adventures of Dubai on this 5-day luxury tour. Visit the Burj Khalifa observation deck, watch the Fountain Show at Dubai Mall, and enjoy a desert safari with a BBQ dinner.
highlights: Dhow cruise dinner along Dubai Marina or Creek
Entry ticket to levels 124 and 125 of the Burj Khalifa tower
4x4 desert jeep safari with dune bashing and camel riding
Free day for shopping or optional Abu Dhabi day tour

title: Grand Europe Tour
description: Explore the best of Europe in 12 days across 6 spectacular countries - France, Switzerland, Italy, Austria, Germany, and the Netherlands. Perfect for travelers seeking iconic landmarks, rich culture, and historic sights in one comprehensive, guided journey.
highlights: Ascend Mount Titlis via the rotating Rotair cable car
Gondola and water taxi excursions in historic Venice
Guided sightseeing at Vatican City and St. Peter's Basilica
Explore the scenic windmills and canals of Amsterdam

title: Goa Getaway
description: Experience the ultimate beach escape with this 4-day Goa tour. Enjoy sun-drenched beaches, historical Portuguese forts, vibrant local markets, and peaceful South Goa heritage sites with guided transfers and premium beach stays.
highlights: Relax on popular beaches like Baga, Calangute, and Anjuna
Explore the historic Fort Aguada and Chapora Fort
Visit the UNESCO World Heritage Basilica of Bom Jesus
Enjoy an optional sunset boat cruise on the Mandovi River

title: Golden Triangle Tour
description: Experience India's cultural heart with our 6-day Golden Triangle tour covering Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur. Highlights include sunrise at the Taj Mahal, Amber Fort excursions, and historic palaces.
highlights: Guided sightseeing tour of historic landmarks in Delhi
Taj Mahal visit at sunset and guided tour of Agra Fort
Explore the abandoned stone city of Fatehpur Sikri
Tour of Amber Fort and the pink palaces of Jaipur

title: Haridwar & Rishikesh Spiritual
description: Explore the spiritual towns of Haridwar and Rishikesh on this 7-day tour from Delhi. Witness the beautiful Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri, visit historic temples via cable car, and walk along the holy River Ganges.
highlights: Attend the divine evening Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri in Haridwar
Ride the hilltop cable cars to Mansa Devi and Chandi Devi temples
Explore the suspension bridges and ashrams of Rishikesh
Spiritual walk along the Vishnu Ghat and Gau Ghat

title: Himachal Delight
description: Enjoy a thrilling 5-day Himachal getaway covering the beautiful hill stations of Shimla, Kufri, and Manali. Includes comfortable stays, daily breakfast, guided local sightseeing, and adventure excursions to Solang Valley.
highlights: Explore Shimla's historic Ridge and Mall Road
Day trip to Kufri for horse riding and mountain views
Scenic road trip to Manali via Pandoh Dam and Kullu Valley
Adventure activities and paragliding in Solang Valley

title: Iceland: Fire & Ice
description: Chase the Northern Lights and explore volcanic landscapes. From geysers to glaciers, Iceland is nature at its most dramatic.
highlights: Northern Lights hunt
Blue Lagoon soak
Glacier hiking
Whale watching

title: Japan: Land of the Rising Sun
description: A carefully crafted journey through Japan's most iconic cities. From Tokyo's electric energy to Kyoto's serene temples and Osaka's legendary street food scene.
highlights: Cherry blossom viewing
Traditional tea ceremony
Bullet train experience
Geisha district tour

title: Kashmir Magical Escape
description: Discover Kashmir’s breathtaking valleys, serene lakes, and snow-capped peaks on this 6-day tour from Delhi. Enjoy shikara rides on Dal Lake, stay in a houseboat, and explore Gulmarg & Pahalgam.
highlights: Delhi to Srinagar flight and sunset Shikara ride on Dal Lake
Guided sightseeing of Mughal Gardens and Shankaracharya Temple
Scenic Gondola cable car ride in Gulmarg
Tour of Pahalgam's Betaab and Aru Valleys next to Lidder River

title: Kerala Magic Escape
description: Experience Kerala’s lush greenery, tranquil backwaters, and spice-scented hills in this 4-day getaway from Delhi. Enjoy houseboat stays, tea gardens, and cultural delights in Munnar & Alleppey.
highlights: Scenic flights and drive to Munnar through tea gardens
Guided sightseeing of Munnar and Eravikulam National Park
Overnight stay and dining on a private backwater houseboat
Fort Kochi city tour before departure

title: Ladakh Himalayan Odyssey
description: Take an amazing 7-day trip to Ladakh. Visit Leh town, ride camels in Nubra Valley, sleep next to Pangong Lake, and explore ancient Buddhist temples. Includes hotel stays, transfers, and sightseeing.
highlights: Rest day to adjust to the high mountain altitude in Leh
Cross the high Khardung La road pass to Nubra Valley
Ride unique double-humped camels on the Hunder sand dunes
Camp next to the world-famous blue waters of Pangong Lake

title: Malaysia Explorer
description: Discover the modern city life, historic temples, and cool highlands of Malaysia on this 4-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of city sightseeing and mountain nature trails.
highlights: Explore the Petronas Twin Towers and KLCC Park in Kuala Lumpur
Visit the historic Batu Caves and Royal Selangor Pewter Factory
Take a day excursion to the cool tea country of Cameron Highlands
Shop for local crafts at Central Market and Chinatown

title: Maldives Paradise Escape
description: Escape to the beautiful islands of the Maldives for a 4-day tropical vacation. Enjoy white sand beaches, clear blue waters, and relaxing resort stays. This tour is perfect for couples, families, and anyone looking for a peaceful holiday in nature.
highlights: Scenic speedboat or seaplane transfers
Snorkeling and water activities
Local island cultural tour
Beach barbecue dinner under the stars

title: Maldives Paradise
description: The ultimate luxury escape. Overwater villas, private beaches, and crystal-clear waters in one of the world's most exclusive destinations.
highlights: Overwater villa stay
Private sunset dolphin cruise
Underwater restaurant dining
Coral reef snorkeling

title: Complete Nepal Exploration
description: Explore the very best of Nepal on this 15-day tour. Visit holy temples in Kathmandu and Janakpur, see the birthplace of Buddha in Lumbini, go on a jungle safari in Chitwan, and enjoy stunning Himalayan views from Pokhara, Nagarkot, and Dhulikhel.
highlights: Pashupatinath Temple visit and evening Aarti prayer ceremony
Scenic boat rides on Phewa Lake and views from Sarangkot
Exciting wildlife jeep safari in Chitwan National Park
Beautiful sunrise and sunset views over the Himalayas from Nagarkot

title: Manang & Mustang Adventure
description: Explore the hidden gems of Nepal on this 9-day tour of the Manang and Mustang regions. Witness stunning mountain landscapes, ancient monasteries, high-altitude villages, and unique Tibetan culture. Perfect for nature lovers and adventurers.
highlights: Scenic travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara and Phewa Lake boating
Rest and sightseeing day in Manang Valley to adjust to the high altitude
Pilgrimage visit to the sacred Muktinath Temple and Kagbeni Village
Excursion to the ancient walled city of Lo Manthang in Upper Mustang

title: Pashupatinath Darshan Tour
description: Take a spiritual 7-day tour to Nepal. Visit the holy Pashupatinath Temple in Kathmandu, along with famous UNESCO heritage temples, beautiful monasteries, and scenic lake cities like Pokhara. This tour is perfect for families and religious travelers.
highlights: Holy prayers at Pashupatinath Temple and evening Aarti ceremony
Guided sightseeing tours of UNESCO heritage temples in Kathmandu
Scenic drive or flight to the beautiful lake city of Pokhara
Spectacular sunrise views over the Himalayas from Sarangkot

title: Ooty Blissful Holiday
description: Escape to the beautiful Nilgiri Hills on this 5-day Ooty package. Ride the historic Toy Train to Coonoor, visit waterfalls and tea estates, and enjoy scenic views from Doddabetta Peak with guided transfers.
highlights: Scenic road trip to Ooty via the famous 36 hairpin bends
Ride the UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway Toy Train
Guided tea factory tour and homemade chocolate tasting
Watch the sunrise from Doddabetta Peak and walk near Pykara Lake

title: Peru: Inca Trail Expedition
description: Walk in the footsteps of the Incas on this epic trek to Machu Picchu. A blend of adventure, history, and Andean culture.
highlights: 4-day Inca Trail trek
Sunrise at Machu Picchu
Sacred Valley exploration
Traditional Pachamanca feast

title: Rajasthan Royal Retreat
description: Experience the grandeur of Rajasthan on this 6-day heritage tour. Explore the magnificent forts, grand palaces, sand dunes, and lakes of Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur with guided tours and stays in heritage settings.
highlights: Guided tours of historic Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada
Jeep and camel desert safari with cultural dance in Jaisalmer
Tour the intricately carved pillars at Ranakpur Jain Temple
Scenic Lake Pichola boat ride and City Palace tour in Udaipur

title: Rishikesh Spiritual & Adventure
description: Experience the perfect mix of adventure and peace on this 7-day Rishikesh tour. Go river rafting, try bungee jumping, hike to waterfalls, visit historic ashrams, and attend the beautiful evening Ganga Aarti.
highlights: Attend the daily evening Ganga Aarti ceremony at Triveni Ghat
Explore the historic Beatles Ashram and Parmarth Niketan
Enjoy white-water river rafting and suspension bridge walks
Hike up to the beautiful natural pools of Neer Garh Waterfall

title: Sahara Desert Odyssey
description: An immersive desert journey from the bustling souks of Marrakech to the silent dunes of the Sahara. Camp under the stars and ride camels at sunrise.
highlights: Camel trek into Erg Chebbi
Luxury desert camp
Medina cooking class
Atlas Mountain drive

title: Santorini Dreamscape
description: Lose yourself in the whitewashed charm of Santorini. From breathtaking caldera sunsets to hidden volcanic beaches, this curated journey blends luxury stays with authentic Greek island life.
highlights: Caldera sunset cruise
Wine tasting in Pyrgos
Private villa with infinity pool
Volcanic hot springs

title: Shimla Getaway
description: Escape to the hills with this 5-day Shimla vacation package. Explore historic British landmarks, hike pine-covered trails in Mashobra and Kufri, and experience mountain scenery with premium transfers and stays.
highlights: Scenic walks along the historic Shimla Ridge and Mall Road
Day trip to Kufri for horse riding and alpine nature parks
Guided cultural tours of Christ Church and Jakhu Temple
Excursion to the quiet orchards and forests of Mashobra

title: Singapore Highlights
description: Experience the futuristic skyline, theme parks, and rich heritage of Singapore on this 5-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of city exploration, shopping, and family-friendly attractions.
highlights: Watch the Spectra Light and Water Show at Marina Bay Sands
Guided tour of Chinatown, Little India, and Gardens by the Bay
Pass to Sentosa Island and Universal Studios theme park
Tram ride at the famous Singapore Zoo Night Safari

title: Wonders of Sri Lanka
description: Discover the ancient history, wildlife, and beaches of Sri Lanka on this 9-day tour. Climb the Sigiriya fortress, visit the temples of Kandy, take a train ride through tea country, and enjoy a safari in Yala National Park.
highlights: Climb the UNESCO-listed Sigiriya Rock Fortress
Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic in Kandy
Scenic train ride through tea plantations to Ella
Jeep safari in Yala National Park and beach stay in Bentota

title: Swiss Alpine Adventure
description: Conquer the Swiss Alps with this adventure-packed journey. From paragliding over Lake Brienz to hiking trails with Matterhorn views.
highlights: Paragliding over Interlaken
Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe
Glacier Express journey
Matterhorn viewpoint hike

title: Thailand Explorer
description: Explore the vibrant culture, stunning beaches, and bustling markets of Thailand on this exciting 5-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of adventure, coastal relaxation, and temple excursions - all within a curated, premium package.
highlights: Explore the historic Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew in Bangkok
Boat cruise along the Chao Phraya River and local shopping
Visit the Sanctuary of Truth wooden temple in Pattaya
Full-day speedboat excursion to Coral Island (Koh Larn)

title: Divine Uttarakhand Journey
description: Discover the sacred rivers and beautiful mountain views of Uttarakhand on this 5-day spiritual journey. Witness the Ganga Aarti, explore the ashrams of Rishikesh, and relax in the cool mountain air of Mussoorie and Dhanaulti.
highlights: Experience the evening Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri in Haridwar
Guided sightseeing of suspension bridges and ashrams in Rishikesh
Visit Kempty Falls and enjoy valley views in Mussoorie
Take a nature walk in the quiet pine forests of Dhanaulti

title: Vietnam Discovery
description: Explore the history and natural beauty of Vietnam on this 6-day budget-friendly tour. Visit the capital city of Hanoi, cruise through Halong Bay, walk the lantern-lit streets of Hoi An, and tour Ho Chi Minh City and the Cu Chi Tunnels.
highlights: Guided sightseeing of Hanoi's historic Old Quarter
Boat cruise with kayaking in the spectacular Halong Bay
Guided walking tour of Hoi An Ancient Town near Da Nang
Explore the historic war-era tunnels of Cu Chi
